name: Science Pack 2 Black Cards List
blackCards: Scientists are using the new James Webb Space Telescope to observe __________ in unprecedented detail.
In her groundbreaking research, Jane Goodall showed that great apes enjoy __________ just as much as humans.
We regret to inform you that the National Science Foundation has declined your proposal to research “__________.”
With CRISPR, we can now genetically engineer human beings who are completely immune to __________.
whiteCards: Accepting that all of our thoughts and feelings are biochemical mechanisms and free will is an illusion.
Cutting my arm open to check if I’m a robot.
A big fuckin’ asteroid is coming to kill us.
Microwaving different stuff to see what happens.
[This picture of a black hole] My black hole.
Trusting COMMON SENSE over the so-called “experts” at the CDC.
A diagram of the female reproductive system.
Detaching my penis inside my mate’s reproductive tract to prevent rival males from inseminating her.
Lead levels 400 times the FDA limit.
Making kids cut open dead frogs.
